Request Early Access

Free template

GST invoice template for Indian businesses.

A simple GST invoice format helps capture party, GSTIN, taxable value, tax amount and total. Fastbooks helps convert invoice context into accounting entry drafts.

Request Early Access See GST accounting

Tool guide

What this page should help with.

What to include

Business name, GSTIN, invoice number, customer details, item details, taxable value, GST and total.

Accounts impact

Each invoice eventually becomes a sales or purchase accounting entry.

Fastbooks connection

Instead of only storing templates, Fastbooks helps prepare review-ready accounting entries.

Fields to capture

Common accounting details.

✓GSTIN
✓Invoice number
✓Taxable value
✓CGST/SGST/IGST
✓Total amount
✓Accounting entry

FFastbooks

Accounting software for Indian businesses that prepares sales, purchase, expense and bank entries from everyday inputs for accountant review.
